subject: Fermi GBM trigger 110823.518 is not a GRB
body:
S. McGlynn (TUM/MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst
Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 335795147 (110823518)
at 12:25:45.68 UT on 23 August 2011, tentatively classified as a GRB, is
in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particle
activity."
